problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
